title: vulpia dertonensis var. broteri
intro: Vulpia dertonensis var. broteri, also known as Saithe Fescue, is a perennial grass species native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can be attributed to the presence of certain flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Vulpia dertonensis var. broteri include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions like eczema. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
